integrations.title: Integrations

deploy.title: Deployment
deploy.subtitle: Push your AI agent to every channel your customers use
deploy.comingSoonDesc: This channel is on our roadmap. Upgrade to Growth to get early access.
deploy.embedHint: Paste this snippet just before the closing </body> tag of your website.

wa.step1Desc: You need a verified Meta Business account to access WhatsApp Business API.
wa.step2Title: Set up a WhatsApp Business Account
wa.step2Desc: Inside Meta Business Suite, go to Business Settings → WhatsApp Accounts and add your WhatsApp Business account. Verify your phone number.
wa.step3Title: Create a Meta App with WhatsApp product
wa.step3Desc: Go to Meta for Developers, create a new app, and add the WhatsApp product to it.
wa.step4Desc: In your Meta App dashboard under WhatsApp → API Setup, copy your temporary access token (or generate a permanent system user token via Meta Business Suite).
wa.step5Desc: Set your webhook URL to the address above and paste your access token below. Aura will handle all incoming messages automatically.

fb.step1Desc: Your Messenger bot must be linked to a Facebook Page (not a personal profile). Create or use an existing Page.
fb.step2Desc: Go to Meta for Developers and create a new app of type Business. Add the Messenger product to your app.
fb.step3Desc: In your app's Messenger settings, generate a Page Access Token for your Facebook Page. Copy it.
fb.step4Desc: Set the webhook URL to the address above. Subscribe to messages and messaging_postbacks events.
fb.step5Desc: Enter your Page Access Token and Page ID. Aura will start responding to all Messenger conversations automatically.

ig.step1Desc: Your Instagram account must be a Creator or Business account. Go to Settings → Account → Switch to Professional Account.
ig.step2Desc: Link your Instagram Professional account to a Facebook Page in Instagram Settings → Linked Accounts. This is required for API access.
ig.step3Desc: Go to Meta for Developers, create an app, and add the Instagram Graph API product.
ig.step4Desc: Request instagram_manage_messages permission for your app. In test mode you can use it immediately; for production, submit for App Review.
ig.step5Desc: Set webhook URL to the address above and subscribe to messages.

api.guideDesc: Integrate Aura into any platform, app, or workflow using our REST API. Send a message and receive an AI-generated response in real time.
api.endpointChat: Send a message and receive AI response
api.authDesc: All API requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Generate your API key below.
api.keyPlaceholder: Your API key will appear here...

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Everything you need to get started and grow with Aura
help.cardGettingStartedDesc: Set up your first agent in minutes
help.cardKBDesc: Browse all help articles and guides
help.cardAPIDesc: Integrate Aura with your own systems
help.subject: Subject
Subject
help.messageSent: ✓ Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
help.supportWelcome: Hi there! 👋 I'm Aura's AI support assistant. I can help you with getting started, integrations, billing, and troubleshooting. What do you need help with?
help.supportPlaceholder: Ask about Aura features, setup, pricing...
help.gettingStartedGuideDesc: Follow our 5-minute setup guide to configure your first agent, upload docs, and go live.
help.faq1Q: How do I train my agent on my documents?
help.faq1A: Go to Documents → upload your PDFs, DOCX, or TXT files. Your agent will automatically process and learn from the content within a few minutes.
help.faq2A: We support PDF, DOCX, TXT, and CSV files. For best results, use clearly formatted text documents. Scanned image PDFs may reduce accuracy.
help.faq3Q: How do I test my agent before deploying?
help.faq3A: Use the Playground section to have real conversations with your agent. You can adjust tone, temperature, and context settings in real time.
help.faq4Q: Can I use my agent on WhatsApp?
help.faq4A: Yes! WhatsApp integration is available on the Growth plan. Go to Deploy → WhatsApp and follow the Business API setup instructions.
help.faq5Q: What happens when the agent doesn't know an answer?
help.faq5A: If escalation is enabled in Agent settings, the chat will hand off to a human agent and notify your team via email.
help.faq6Q: How do I embed the chat widget on my website?
help.faq6A: Go to Deploy → Web Widget → copy the embed code snippet and paste it before the closing </body> tag on your website.

hero.title: Your best employee,
hero.sub: Give your business an AI agent that talks exactly like your brand, knows everything about your products, and deploys to every channel in one click — no code, no complexity.

features.title: Everything your agent needs
features.sub: Three pillars that make Aura agents genuinely useful — not just another chatbot.
features.f1Desc: Train your agent on your actual language. Upload past conversations, your FAQ, even how you write emails — the agent mirrors your tone exactly.
features.f2Desc: Upload PDFs, menus, price lists, policies. Your agent answers specific questions about your business — no hallucinations, no generic responses.
features.f3Desc: Publish to your website, Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp Business, and Instagram DMs simultaneously — one embed code, one dashboard.
features.f4Desc: Every conversation is an insight. Aura tracks unresolved questions and suggests knowledge gaps so your agent improves week by week.

how.title: Up and running
how.s1Desc: Upload your documents, FAQs, and product info. Add your brand's tone and voice guidelines.
how.s2Desc: Use the live playground to chat with your agent. Tweak responses until it sounds exactly like you.
how.s3Desc: Grab your embed code and paste it into your website. Connect WhatsApp and Messenger in two clicks.

pricing.title: Simple pricing,
